dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Price closes below weekly S1 pivot level (multi-day support reference), AND (2) Price breaks below previous day's low (multi-day low break). Exit when price crosses back above S1 (reversal/support reclaim). 'Early in day' timing is assumed to be enforced at backtest execution level via bar filtering. Signal appears to target intraday reversals with potential multi-day follow-through on trend weakness below S1.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) Price closes below weekly S1 pivot level (multi-day support reference), AND (2) Price breaks below previous day's low (multi-day low break). Exit when price crosses back above S1 (reversal/support reclaim). 'Early in day' timing is assumed to be enforced at backtest execution level via bar filtering. Signal appears to target intraday reversals with potential multi-day follow-through on trend weakness below S1.

source_rule_text: When a multi-day low is broken early in the day, treat it as a bearish signal for the remainder of the day and potentially for many more days to come.
